final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing children's picture book illustration of a forest scene with animals having a concert (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "儿童绘本" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Beatrix Potter (classic British children's book illustration), Studio Ghibli background art (whimsical nature scenes), Richard Scarry (busy, charming animal worlds); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include cute animals having a concert — specifically a rabbit playing the cello and a squirrel playing the flute
Scene/backdrop: must include a fairy-tale forest with mushroom houses and a rainbow in the background
Lighting/mood: needs a whimsical, cheerful atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a bright, vivid, and playful direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
